# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt

There is only one obvious next bounded move after the reviewed session, so making branch cards would just restate the same route in several cosmetic variants.

## Expected selection

do_not_use

## Why

Branch analysis is unnecessary when there is only one honest next move and no
meaningful fork surface survives the reviewed session.

## Expected object

A deflection that says branch analysis is unnecessary because there is only one
honest next move.

## Boundary notes

Do not use this skill for cosmetic branch inflation. It should stay reserved
for real post-session forks with materially different gains, costs, or risks.

## Verification hooks

The response should reject unnecessary fork cards and keep the route bounded to
the single obvious next move.
